step_rationale: Endogenous antioxidant lipid; enriched in MI-prone lipoprotein, degraded in vascular disease.
mechanism: Plasmalogens are ether-linked lipids with antioxidant function; their reduction in MI-prone and atherosclerotic vessels marks increased oxidative burden.

references.title: Lipidomic Signature of Abdominal Aortic Aneurysm and Peripheral Artery Disease.
Lipidomic analysis of plasma lipoprotein fractions in myocardial infarction-prone rabbits.
